name: CloudCoCo Group plc
summary: CloudCoCo Group plc provides information technology (IT) and communications services to small and medium-sized enterprises in the United Kingdom. The company operates through three segments: Recurring Services, Product, and Professional Services. The Recurring Services segment provides continuing IT services, which have an ongoing billing and support elements. The Product segment engages in the resale of hardware and software solutions. The Professional Services segment offers resources to consult, design, install, configure, and integrate IT technologies. The company also offers cyber security services, such as security assessment, network security, end-point protection, penetration and cloud application testing, email security, identity and access management, cyber essentials accreditation, and security operations; connectivity services, including secure global learning, broadband and ethernet, SD-WAN, leased lines, public sector networks, Internet, and cloud connectivity, as well as LAN, WiFi, and analytics services; and communications services comprising cloud telephone and unified cloud, SIP tunking, analogue calls and lines, inbound, mobile and mobile device management, contact center, and maintenance and support. In addition, it provides public, private, and hybrid cloud, colocation, data center migration and optimization, business continuity and disaster recovery, and Veeam availability suite; Microsoft services; managed IT services, which include service desk, managed infrastructure, network and security operation center, and field services; and cost analysis services. The company was formerly known as Adept4 Plc and changed its name to CloudCoCo Group plc in November 2019. CloudCoCo Group plc was incorporated in 2004 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
